---
title: "**Phonology II**"
subtitle: "**Tuesday**"
author: "Quartz Colvin (they/them)"
institute: "Rutgers University"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["rutgers", "rutgers-fonts"]
    lib_dir: libs
    includes:
      after_body: [nav.html, header.html]
    nature:
      ratio: "16:9"
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false

---
